text:

Episode 8: That's not weird at all... Watch Go For It, Nakamura-kun!! on Crunchyroll! https://got.cr/cc-gfink

ABOUT GO FOR IT, NAKAMURA-KUN!!
Love at first sight is no myth—just ask Okuto Nakamura. Whenever his dreamy classmate Aiki Hirose enters the room, his heart skips a beat, despite the fact that they’ve never actually spoken. Not to mention, Nakamura is a complete klutz with zero friends. Will he ruin his chance at love before it even begins?

Episode 5: Asa and Yuru get to know each other a little! Watch Daemons of the Shadow Realm on Crunchyroll! https://got.cr/cc-dotsr

In a world where certain humans command mighty supernatural duos called Daemons, it is the birthright of "the children who sunder day and night"—twins Yuru and Asa—to rule over these powerful entities.

Separated from a young age and unaware of the truth of their birth, brother and sister must fight to make their way back to each other, claim their birthright, and save the world...

text:
"I Love You... Please Don't Go" | Agents of the Four Seasons: Dance of Spring
Episode 8: Hinagiku's touching sacrifice... Watch Agents of the Four Seasons: Dance of Spring on Crunchyroll! https://got.cr/cc-aotfsdos

AGENTS OF THE FOUR SEASONS: DANCE OF SPRING
When the Agent of Spring, Hinagiku Kayo, is abducted, spring itself vanishes—plunging the world into unending winter. Refusing to give up, her devoted guard, Sakura Himedaka, searches for her for years. When Hinagiku suddenly returns, the two set out to restore the lost season, face the past that tore them apart, and reclaim the warmth they refuse to lose again.

text:
Banzai... I guess | Re:ZERO
Episode 2:  Watch Re:ZERO on Crunchyroll! https://got.cr/cc-rezero

ABOUT RE:ZERO
Natsuki Subaru, an ordinary high school student, is on his way home from the convenience store when he finds himself transported to another world. As he's lost and confused in a new world where he doesn't even know left from right, the only person to reach out to him was a beautiful girl with silver hair. Determined to repay her somehow for saving him from his own despair, Subaru agrees to help the girl find something she's looking for...

text:
Demon Boys Always Trying to Seduce Lilith | Welcome to Demon School! Iruma-kun Season 4
Episode 7: They really went all-out on the costumes... Watch Welcome to Demon School! Iruma-kun on Crunchyroll! https://got.cr/cc-wtdsik

ABOUT WELCOME TO DEMON SCHOOL! IRUMA-KUN
Suzuki Iruma, human, 14, one day finds himself taken against his will into the world of demons. To add to his predicament, his doting owner and self-appointed "Grandpa" is the chair-demon at his new school. In order to survive, Iruma must deal with a haughty student who challenges him to a duel, a girl with adjustment issues, and so many more scary beings! Can this ultimate pacifist dodge the slings and arrows that are flung his way? As he struggles frantically, Iruma's innate kindness begins to win over enemies.

text:
Ferdinand Makes the Kingdom Swoon | Ascendance of a Bookworm
Episode 42: His charm is too much! Watch Ascendance of a Bookworm on Crunchyroll! https://got.cr/cc-aoab

ABOUT ASCENDANCE OF A BOOKWORM
In a world ruled by magical nobles, Myne dreams of creating books where none exist. When her immense power draws deadly attention, she assumes a new identity as Rozemyne, leaving her family and past behind. In a society driven by ambition, secrets, and schemes, she must outwit conspirators, protect those she loves, and fight to bring books and hope to a world that has long forgotten both.
